summary: Started M7 formal content lock acceptance routing on the dedicated process branch. This is a Human Gate preparation task only; no product code, content-source data, Gate docs, roadmap, or release artifacts are changed, and formal content lock is not approved by this start record.

tests_run.result: Branch codex/m7-content-lock-acceptance; initial short status before package writes: M project/tasks/active/M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001.json.

tests_run.command: git rev-parse HEAD && git rev-parse origin/main

tests_run.result: Task schema validated before start handoff creation.

decisions.decision: Prepare a formal content lock recommendation package for QA review before asking the product owner.
Do not mark content locked, M7 Gate passed, release-ready, or manually human-accepted without explicit product-owner approval.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and is not a M7/M8 blocker.

risks.summary: The content lock decision itself is a Human Gate and cannot be decided by agents.

requested_action: Continue synthesizing the Human Gate recommendation and route it to qa_reviewer for read-only verification.
